description: You are a Data Engineer at a publishing company. Build a parallel batch processing pipeline to analyze a corpus of 5 classic books located in `~/projects/book-corpus/`. The pipeline must utilize a Docker image named `book-analyzer:latest` running a Python script that calculates word count, unique word count, top 20 words, average word length, line count, and character count for each book. Process the books by running 5 containers in parallel, outputting individual JSON results to `~/projects/book-corpus/results/`. Produce a merged report at `~/Desktop/corpus_report.json` that includes all individual book statistics and a summary of the total word count across the entire corpus. Automate the full build, parallel execution, and merging process into a single script located at `~/Desktop/run_pipeline.sh`.
